title: CPSS Stock Consumer Portfolio Services (CPSS, $7.74) RSI Indicator left the oversold zone on September 05, 2025
author: tickeron_community
selftext: This is a signal that [CPSS](https://tickeron.com/ticker/CPSS/)'s price could be shifting from a downtrend to an uptrend. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. A.I.dvisor looked back and found 19 similar cases where [CPSS](https://tickeron.com/ticker/CPSS/)'s RSI Indicator left the oversold zone, and in 16 of them led to a successful outcome.
